name: gestion-flotte-gateway
description: GraphQL Gateway for Gestion Flotte microservices

scripts.test:k6:smoke:docker: docker run --rm --network host -e PROFILE=smoke -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work grafana/k6 run tests/k6/starter.js
scripts.test:k6:load:docker: docker run --rm --network host -e PROFILE=load -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work grafana/k6 run tests/k6/starter.js
scripts.test:k6:spike:docker: docker run --rm --network host -e PROFILE=spike -v "$PWD:/work" -w /work grafana/k6 run tests/k6/starter.js
